phd.title: PhD Journey
phd.description: Long-term research goals, writing, coursework and skill building.

items.title: Topic Exploration Session
items.notes: Read 2 papers or map a new idea.

items.title: Research Skill-Building Block
items.notes: Practice a method or tool for 45–60 minutes.

items.title: Coursework & Reading Sprint
items.notes: Focused reading or assignment work.

items.title: Academic Writing Session
items.notes: Draft 300–800 words or revise a section.

items.title: Literature Review Update
items.notes: Add 3 citations or summarize 2 papers.

items.title: Data Analysis Block
items.notes: Run experiments, clean data, or analyze results.

skool.title: Skool Community
skool.description: Course creation, community engagement, and content production.

items.title: Community Engagement (Reply + Post)
items.notes: Post or meaningfully reply to community threads.

items.title: Lesson Recording Prep
items.notes: Outline or rehearse a lesson segment.

items.title: Curriculum Development Block
items.notes: Design a lesson or module.

items.title: Lesson Editing Session
items.notes: Edit recorded lesson or create assets.

doc.title: Documentary Tracking
doc.description: Daily logs, milestones, and documentary-style reflections.

items.title: Daily Log Entry
items.notes: Write a short log of progress and obstacles.

items.title: Milestone Capture
items.notes: Record a milestone (chapter draft, submission, presentation).

items.title: Monthly Reflection Draft
items.notes: Summarize wins, blockers, and next steps.

items.title: Lesson Recording / Documentary Clip
items.notes: Record a short clip for documentary or course.

daily.title: Daily Systems
daily.description: Rituals and focused daily work blocks.

items.title: Morning Routine Complete
items.notes: Complete morning checklist.

items.title: Deep Work Block (60 min)
items.notes: One uninterrupted deep work session.

items.title: Evening Reflection
items.notes: Short reflection and plan for tomorrow.

items.title: Microtask Sprint (25 min)
items.notes: Pomodoro-style microtask.

items.title: Weekly Review
items.notes: Review last week and plan next week.

items.title: Academic Progress Check
items.notes: Check milestones, experiments, and deadlines.

items.title: Weekly Build Session
items.notes: Longer build or recording session.

items.title: Monthly Ecosystem Review
items.notes: High-level review of goals and systems.

items.title: PhD Direction Check-in
items.notes: Reassess research direction and priorities.

items.title: Set Monthly Goals
items.notes: Define 3 measurable goals for the month.

shop.name: Akatsuki Cloak
shop.description: A signature cloak that changes your avatar's look and grants a small prestige badge.

shop.name: Akatsuki Ring
shop.description: A ring that appears on your avatar and increases daily streak XP bonus by 5% (visual only).

shop.name: Anbu Mask
shop.description: A mysterious mask for your avatar; purely cosmetic.

shop.name: Summon Raven Companion
shop.description: A raven companion that appears beside your avatar and grants a small XP animation on task completion.

shop.name: Leather Notebook
shop.description: Cosmetic notebook; unlocks a 'quick note' UI in future updates.

shop.name: Research Dagger
shop.description: Cosmetic blade; used in avatar portraits and achievement banners.

quests.title: Chapter One: Draft Complete
quests.description: Complete the first full draft of chapter one.

quests.title: Publish a Lesson
quests.description: Record and publish one lesson to the Skool community.

classes.name: Research Assassin
classes.description: Focused, high-impact sessions. Cosmetic title and future skill perks.

classes.name: Curriculum Sage
classes.description: Course-building oriented. Cosmetic title and future perks.

metaNotes.persistence: Client-side localStorage is authoritative. game-data.json seeds the first run only; saved sections (ak_sections) will not be overwritten.
metaNotes.customTaskGuideline: IDs for custom tasks are generated client-side; keep titles concise.
metaNotes.extensibility: This JSON includes shop, quests, achievements and avatar defaults to support the full RPG dashboard.
